function.message: I could not safely process a concrete “next inbox item” because there is no actionable inbox request in `00_inbox/` (only `AGENTS.MD`), and the lowest router-listed item (`99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md`) is a workflow reference document rather than a task request. Please clarify which inbox root/file should be treated as the next actionable item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read relevant workflow docs, then used lowest-filename rule in 00_inbox. No workspace mutation when blocked.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows missing/ambiguous actionable input: `00_inbox` listing contains only `AGENTS.MD`, and the read candidate `99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md` contains generic deletion policy, not a specific request to execute. Proceeding would require guessing target work.
